headline: 3 Growth Companies With Insider Ownership Up To 15%
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has risen by 1.8%, and over the past 12 months, it has increased by 30%, with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this thriving environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often indicate strong confidence from those closest to the business.
